title: BEM-860 scheduler wire
objective: Wire BEM-859 mailbox polling into existing internal scheduler, without adding GitHub schedule triggers and without paid APIs. Inspect repository for existing scheduler/curator/autonomy polling config. Add or update a safe config/registry entry so the internal scheduler checks governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md every 60 seconds until one final status is found: APPROVED, APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS, BLOCKED_WITH_REASON. When final status is found, write/read result marker under governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESULT.md. If no executable scheduler framework exists in repo, create governance/runtime/mailbox_polling/BEM859_SCHEDULER_REQUIRED.md with blocker explaining exact missing component, but keep polling contract files. Update governance/tasks/pending/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT.md status to pending_mailbox_polling. Do not ask operator for confirmation. Do not write issue #31. No issue comments.
